## AgentCompanyBaseSchema variable

Base schema for AgentCompany entity. Used for list views and minimal data fetching for performance. Contains only essential fields without relationships.

**Signature:**

```typescript

	{
		id: z.ZodString
		legacyId: z.ZodString
		email: z.ZodBranded<z.ZodString, 'Email'>
		name: z.ZodBranded<z.ZodString, 'Name'>
		phone: z.ZodBranded<z.ZodString, 'PhoneNumber'>
		useSsn: z.ZodBoolean
		createdAt: z.ZodBranded<z.ZodDate, 'InstantUTC'>
		updatedAt: z.ZodBranded<z.ZodDate, 'InstantUTC'>
	},
	'strip',
	z.ZodTypeAny,
	{
		id: string
		createdAt: Date & z.BRAND<'InstantUTC'>
		updatedAt: Date & z.BRAND<'InstantUTC'>
		name: string & z.BRAND<'Name'>
		email: string & z.BRAND<'Email'>
		legacyId: string
		phone: string & z.BRAND<'PhoneNumber'>
		useSsn: boolean
	},
```
